variants.title: HiFi Filter KD 70436 Urea Filter Kit | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 553-SET
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter KD 70436 Urea Filter Kit | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 553-SET
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter KD 70436 Urea Filter Kit is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 553-SET. Easy to install and replace, the KD 70436 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: UREA FILTER KIT, Dimension 1 (D1): 75.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 71.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 65.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M60X2, Height 1 (H1): 102.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 20.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 1.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter U 58/11 KIT Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 553-SET
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter U 58/11 KIT Urea Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 553-SET
variants.description: The compact MANN-FILTER urea filters are characterized by high filter fineness, proven suitability for everyday use and a long service life. They protect system components against wear and failure and are resistant to frost and ammonia. MANN-FILTER urea filters are available for leading SCR systems in trucks and buses.
specifications: Style: Urea Filter, Dimension A: 75.0 mm, Dimension H: 104.0 mm
